title: Soft Bedroom Lace Loungewear Product Portrait AI
sourceTitle: Soft Bedroom Lace Loungewear Product Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Subject: adult female model in champagne satin lounge dress with lace trim and matching robe, fully covered elegant styling appears as the adult model and product focus, with natural elegant appearance, mature soft femininity, realistic face, healthy balanced figure, and clearly visible fabric construction. Scene: soft neutral bedroom campaign, fabric texture and product silhouette emphasized creates the soft bedroom campaign context, emphasizing bedding, fabric texture, product silhouette, and a calm premium lifestyle mood rather than a studio catalog setup. Composition: Fixed high-angle bedroom portrait: model reclines naturally on soft bedding, body placed diagonally in frame, upper body slightly leaning back, shoulders relaxed, calm gaze toward camera, and the dress or loungewear product remains fully readable. Signature Elements: High-angle reclining pose, diagonal body placement, visible lace texture, neckline and waist structure, soft bedding, calm expression, elegant product campaign mood, and non-catalog bedroom realism. Style: Realistic soft bedroom product campaign photography with natural skin texture, elegant adult styling, gentle intimacy, commercial fabric clarity, and polished lifestyle advertising finish. Color Palette: Soft champagne, lace white, rose taupe, lavender, cream bedding, warm skin tones, muted bedroom neutrals, and delicate fabric highlights. Lighting: Soft diffused bedroom light with gentle highlight on lace, satin, straps, neckline, waist shape, skirt drape, bedding folds, and realistic skin texture. Camera: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Materials: Lace, satin, tulle, soft bedding, robe fabric, straps, delicate trim, layered drape, realistic skin, and subtle bedroom textile detail. Restrictions: Use an adult model only. Keep styling tasteful, covered, and product-focused.

使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
